CREATE TABLE test_array (id INT, constant_value INT);
SELECT arrayWithConstant(length, elem) FROM (SELECT 5 AS length, 7 AS elem);
SELECT arrayWithConstant(2, id) AS constant_arrays FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayWithConstant(5, constant_value) FROM (SELECT constant_value FROM test_array WHERE id = 2);
CREATE TABLE nested_test (a Int32, b Int32);
SELECT arrayWithConstant(3, arrayWithConstant(2, a + b)) FROM nested_test;
SELECT arrayWithConstant(3, arrayWithConstant(2, 1)) UNION ALL SELECT arrayWithConstant(2, 4);
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_array) AS length, 8 AS elem SELECT arrayWithConstant(length, elem);
CREATE TABLE join_table (id INT, value INT);
SELECT arrayWithConstant(3, j.value) AS repeated_values FROM join_table j JOIN test_array t ON j.id = t.id;
